title: How much money can you save if you quit smoking? - Canada.ca
content:
## How much can you save if you quit smoking?
Text on screen: How much can you save if you quit smoking?
A woman exercises using dumbbells.
Text on screen: I bought gym equipment
A man smiles while driving a car.
Text on screen: I bought a car
A woman wearing a headset plays on her computer.
Text on screen: I got a new gaming system
A man smiles, looking down at the credit card he is holding.
Text on screen: I paid off my credit card
Text on screen: Find out with our cost calculator
Text on screen: Get tips and other tools to help you quit smoking
Image on screen: The Canadian Government logo with accompanying jingle
Text on screen: canada.ca/quit-smoking
